title: Christmas Stuffed Animal Cute Plush Moose Reindeer Stuffed Animal for Baby Boys Girls Home Bedroom Party Decoration
features: a Brown Elk: this Christmas stuffed animal is about 30 cm/ 11.8 inch tall, and you will receive 1 piece brown washable elk in the package; This cute elk can be a Christmas decoration for home, room, bed, furniture and car

Quality You Can Trust: our reindeer stuffed animal is made of quality plush material and filled with PP cotton, soft and cozy to touch, suitable for holding in your arms; Warm reminder: due to transportation needs, the reindeer plush toy is vacuum packed; After receiving it, you can pat and knead it, blow it with hot air from a hair dryer for a while, or wet its surface and throw it into the dryer at low temperature for ten minutes to restore its fluffy state

Sitting position: this cute plush moose plush has a sweet black eye expression, facial details, stitching, and small horns; Its sitting posture attracts imaginative adventure and adds extra play value to this lovely plush elk

Home decoration: this plush moose stuffed animal can be applied as a nice ornament on a sofa, bed, table or in a car; You can put it on the children's bed, room and living room sofa to make your room more attractive

Drive away the bad mood: when your child is stressed, or when you feel stressed; This moose plush can transform battles and tantrums into moments of calm for the whole family; When your child is on the verge of collapse, struggling with daily changes, or just going through a difficult time, give them this moose to make him calm down
description: Features: Cute and adorable stuffed animal: Our brown cute elk is soft and lovely. They will bring happiness to you and your family. It s time to enjoy the interesting plush moose from our handmade small stuffed animals. Adorable presents for you love: You can send this cute moose to your lovers or children as a warm surprise, on Christmas Day, children's Day, Valentine's Day and other holidays. Specifications: Material: plush material Color: as the pictures show Size: 30 cm/ 11.8 inch tall Package includes: 1 x Cute elk Note: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color may exist slight difference due to different screen displays.
